debug_info.goal:
S : Finset ℕ
h₀ : S.card = 10
h₁ : S ⊆ Finset.Ico 10 100
⊢ ∃ S₁ S₂, S₁.Nonempty ∧ S₁ ⊆ S ∧ S₂.Nonempty ∧ S₂ ⊆ S ∧ Disjoint S₁ S₂ ∧ ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  have hpos : ∀ x ∈ S, 0 < x := by
    intro x hx
    have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hx
    have hxge : 10 ≤ x := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI).1
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : (0 : ℕ) < 10) hxge
  have hle : ∀ x ∈ S, x ≤ 99 := by
    intro x hx
    have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hx
    have hxlt : x < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI).2
    exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using hxlt)
  set A : Finset (Finset ℕ) := S.powerset.erase ∅
  have hAcard : A.card = 1023 := by
    have : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ S.card := by simpa using (Finset.card_powerset S)
    have hne : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset := by
      simpa using (Finset.empty_mem_powerset : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset)
    have : A.card = S.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simpa [A, Finset.card_erase_of_mem hne]
    calc
      A.card = S.powerset.card - 1 := this
      _ = (2 ^ S.card) - 1 := by simpa [this] using congrArg (fun t => t - 1) this.symm |> (by
          intro h; exact rfl)
      _ = (2 ^ 10) - 1 := by simpa [h₀]
      _ = 1023 := by decide
  set f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x
  have hsum_le : ∀ T, T ⊆ S → f T ≤ 990 := by
    intro T hTS
    have : f T ≤ ∑ x ∈ S, x := by
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg hTS (by intro x hx; exact Nat.zero_le x)
    have : ∑ x ∈ S, x ≤ 990 := by
      have : ∑ x ∈ S, x ≤ ∑ _x ∈ S, 99 := by
        refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
        intro x hx
        exact hle x hx
      simpa [h₀] using le_trans this (by
        simpa [Finset.sum_const_nat, h₀, Nat.mul_comm] )
    exact le_trans (by simpa [f] using this) this
  have hrange : Set.Finite (Set.range fun T : {T // T ∈ A} => f T.1) := by
    exact Set.finite_range _
  have hcod :
      (Set.range fun T : {T // T ∈ A} => f T.1) ⊆ (Set.Icc (1 : ℕ) 990) := by
    intro y hy
    rcases hy with ⟨⟨T, hTA⟩, rfl⟩
    have hTsub : T ⊆ S := by
      have : T ∈ S.powerset := by
        have : T ∈ A := hTA
        have : T ∈ S.powerset := by
          have : T ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hTA
          exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2
        exact this
      exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
    have hTne : T.Nonempty := by
      have : T ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hTA
      exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr (Finset.ne_of_mem_erase this)
    have hlow : (1 : ℕ) ≤ f T := by
      rcases hTne with ⟨a, ha⟩
      have haS : a ∈ S := hTsub ha
      have hap : 0 < a := hpos a haS
      have : a ≤ f T := by
        have : a = ∑ x ∈ ({a} : Finset ℕ), x := by simp
        have hsubset : ({a} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ T := by
          intro x hx
          simpa using (by simpa [Finset.mem_singleton] at hx; simpa [hx] using ha)
        have : ∑ x ∈ ({a} : Finset ℕ), x ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, x := by
          exact Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg hsubset (by intro x hx; exact Nat.zero_le x)
        simpa [f] using le_trans (by simpa using le_of_eq this) this
      exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le hap this))
    have hup : f T ≤ 990 := hsum_le T hTsub
    exact ⟨hlow, hup⟩
  have hIcc_card : (Set.Icc (1 : ℕ) 990).Finite := by simpa using (Set.finite_Icc (1 : ℕ) 990)
  have hIcc : (Set.Icc (1 : ℕ) 990).toFinset.card = 990 := by
    simpa using (Finset.card_Icc 1 990)
  have hrange_card_le : (Set.range fun T : {T // T ∈ A} => f T.1).toFinset.card ≤ 990 := by
    have : (Set.range fun T : {T // T ∈ A} => f T.1) ⊆ Set.Icc (1 : ℕ) 990 := hcod
    simpa [Set.Finite.toFinset] using
      (Finset.card_le_of_subset (by
        intro y hy
        exact this (by simpa using hy)))
  have hdomain_card : (Finset.univ : Finset {T // T ∈ A}).card = 1023 := by
    simpa [Fintype.card_coe] using (by
      have : Fintype.card {T // T ∈ A} = A.card := Fintype.card_subtype_iff.mpr (by intro; rfl)
      simpa [hAcard] using congrArg id this)
  have : ∃ (T₁ T₂ : {T // T ∈ A}), T₁ ≠ T₂ ∧ f T₁.1 = f T₂.1 := by
    classical
    by_contra h
    have hinj :
        Function.Injective (fun T : {T // T ∈ A} => f T.1) := by
      intro x y hxy
      by_contra hne
      exact h ⟨x, y, hne, hxy⟩
    have hcard_le :
        (Finset.univ : Finset {T // T ∈ A}).card ≤
          (Set.range fun T : {T // T ∈ A} => f T.1).toFinset.card := by
      simpa using (Fintype.card_le_of_injective (fun T : {T // T ∈ A} => f T.1) hinj)
    have : 1023 ≤ 990 := by
      have := le_trans (by simpa [hdomain_card] using hcard_le) hrange_card_le
      simpa using this
    exact (by decide : ¬(1023 ≤ 990)) this
  rcases this with ⟨⟨T₁, hT₁A⟩, ⟨T₂, hT₂A⟩, hne, hsum⟩
  have hT₁sub : T₁ ⊆ S := by
    have : T₁ ∈ S.powerset := by
      have : T₁ ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hT₁A
      exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2
    exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
  have hT₂sub : T₂ ⊆ S := by
    have : T₂ ∈ S.powerset := by
      have : T₂ ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hT₂A
      exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2
    exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
  have hT₁ne : T₁.Nonempty := by
    have : T₁ ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hT₁A
    exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr (Finset.ne_of_mem_erase this)
  have hT₂ne : T₂.Nonempty := by
    have : T₂ ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hT₂A
    exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr (Finset.ne_of_mem_erase this)
  let A₁ : Finset ℕ := T₁ \ T₂
  let A₂ : Finset ℕ := T₂ \ T₁
  have hdis : Disjoint A₁ A₂ := by
    exact Finset.disjoint_left.mpr (by
      intro x hx1 hx2
      have hx1' : x ∈ T₁ := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx1).1
      have hx2' : x ∈ T₂ := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx2).1
      have hxnot2 : x ∉ T₂ := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx1).2
      exact hxnot2 hx2')
  have hsum' : ∑ x ∈ A₁, x = ∑ x ∈ A₂, x := by
    have : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) =
        (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) := by
      simpa [f] using congrArg (fun t => t + (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x)) hsum
    have hsplit1 : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x) := by
      simpa [Finset.sum_union, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter, Finset.sdiff_union_inter] using
        (Finset.sum_sdiff_add_sum_inter (s := T₁) (t := T₂) (f := fun x => x)).symm
    have hsplit2 : (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x) := by
      simpa [Finset.inter_comm] using
        (Finset.sum_sdiff_add_sum_inter (s := T₂) (t := T₁) (f := fun x => x)).symm
    have :
        (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) := by
      have := congrArg (fun z => z + ∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x) hsum
      simpa [hsplit1, hsplit2, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
    simpa [A₁, A₂] using this
  have hA₁ne : A₁.Nonempty := by
    by_contra hA₁
    have hA₁e : A₁ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hA₁
    have hT₁subsetT₂ : T₁ ⊆ T₂ := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hx'
      have : x ∈ T₁ \ T₂ := by exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hx'⟩
      simpa [A₁, hA₁e] using this
    have hA₂ne : A₂.Nonempty := by
      have hneq : T₂ \ T₁ ≠ ∅ := by
        intro h
        have hT₂subsetT₁ : T₂ ⊆ T₁ := by
          intro x hx
          by_contra hx'
          have : x ∈ T₂ \ T₁ := by exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hx'⟩
          simpa [A₂, h] using this
        have : T₁ = T₂ := Finset.Subset.antisymm hT₁subsetT₂ hT₂subsetT₁
        exact hne (by cases T₁; cases T₂; simpa at this)
      exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hneq
    have : ∑ x ∈ A₂, x = 0 := by simpa [hsum', hA₁e]
    rcases hA₂ne with ⟨a, ha⟩
    have haS : a ∈ S := hT₂sub ((Finset.mem_sdiff.mp ha).1)
    have hap : 0 < a := hpos a haS
    have : a ≤ ∑ x ∈ A₂, x := by
      have : ∑ x ∈ ({a} : Finset ℕ), x ≤ ∑ x ∈ A₂, x := by
        refine Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg ?_ (by intro x hx; exact Nat.zero_le x)
        intro x hx
        have : x = a := by simpa [Finset.mem_singleton] using hx
        subst this
        exact ha
      simpa using (le_trans (by simp) this)
    have : (0 : ℕ) < ∑ x ∈ A₂, x := lt_of_lt_of_le hap this
    exact this.ne' (by simpa [this] using rfl)
  have hA₂ne : A₂.Nonempty := by
    by_contra hA₂
    have hA₂e : A₂ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hA₂
    have hT₂subsetT₁ : T₂ ⊆ T₁ := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hx'
      have : x ∈ T₂ \ T₁ := by exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hx'⟩
      simpa [A₂, hA₂e] using this
    have hT₁subsetT₂ : T₁ ⊆ T₂ := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hx'
      have : x ∈ T₁ \ T₂ := by exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hx'⟩
      have : x ∈ A₁ := by simpa [A₁] using this
      exact (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp (by
        intro hneA₁
        exact False.elim (by
          rcases hneA₁ with ⟨b, hb⟩
          exact (by simpa [A₁] using hb)) )) (by rfl)
    have : T₁ = T₂ := Finset.Subset.antisymm hT₁subsetT₂ hT₂subsetT₁
    exact hne (by cases T₁; cases T₂; simpa at this)
  refine ⟨A₁, A₂, hA₁ne, ?_, hA₂ne, ?_, hdis, ?_⟩
  · intro x hx
    exact hT₁sub ((Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1)
  · intro x hx
    exact hT₂sub ((Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1)
  · simpa [A₁, A₂] using hsum'
